test_cases.description: Verify that the form submits successfully when all required fields (title, description, priority, due date, user_name) are filled.
test_cases.name: Create Task Successfully With All Required Fields

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with empty fields and a mock onSubmit handler.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with the provided task details, and no validation errors are shown.
test_setup.when: User enters valid values for title, description, priority, due date, and user_name, then clicks submit.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows a validation error when the title field is empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails When Title Is Missing

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for the title field is displayed.
test_setup.when: User fills description, priority, due date, and user_name, leaves title empty, and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows a validation error when the description field is empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails When Description Is Missing

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for the description field is displayed.
test_setup.when: User fills title, priority, due date, and user_name, leaves description empty, and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows a validation error when the priority field is empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails When Priority Is Missing

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for the priority field is displayed.
test_setup.when: User fills title, description, due date, and user_name, leaves priority empty, and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows a validation error when the due date field is empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails When Due Date Is Missing

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for the due date field is displayed.
test_setup.when: User fills title, description, priority, and user_name, leaves due date empty, and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows a validation error when the user_name field is empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails When User Name Is Missing

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for the user_name field is displayed.
test_setup.when: User fills title, description, priority, and due date, leaves user_name empty, and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form does not submit and shows validation errors for all required fields when submitted empty.
test_cases.name: Submission Fails With All Fields Blank

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields empty.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and validation errors for all required fields are displayed.
test_setup.when: User clicks submit without entering any data.

test_cases.description: Verify that the priority dropdown renders with expected options (e.g., Low, Medium, High).
test_cases.name: Priority Options Render Correctly

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered.
test_setup.then: Priority options such as Low, Medium, and High are visible and selectable.
test_setup.when: User inspects the priority dropdown.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form shows a validation error when due date is set to a past date.
test_cases.name: Due Date Must Be In The Future

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called, and a validation error for due date is displayed.
test_setup.when: User enters a due date that is before today and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify the title field accepts and submits the maximum allowed length (e.g., 255 characters) without error.
test_cases.name: Title Field Accepts Maximum Allowed Length

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with a max title length constraint (e.g., 255 chars).
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with the long title, and no validation errors are shown.
test_setup.when: User enters a title with 'T.repeat(255)' characters, fills other required fields, and submits.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form submits successfully when the category field is left blank.
test_cases.name: Category Field Is Optional

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called, and no validation error for category is shown.
test_setup.when: User fills all required fields, leaves category blank, and submits.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form renders input fields for title, description, priority, category, due date, and user_name.
test_cases.name: All Fields Render On Form

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered.
test_setup.then: Input fields for title, description, priority, category, due date, and user_name are visible.
test_setup.when: User inspects the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that after a validation error is shown, correcting the input removes the error.
test_cases.name: Validation Error Is Cleared After Correct Input

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered. User submits form with title missing and sees validation error.
test_setup.then: Validation error for title is cleared.
test_setup.when: User enters a valid title.

test_cases.description: Verify that the submit button is disabled when any required field is missing.
test_cases.name: Submit Button Is Disabled When Form Is Invalid

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with at least one required field empty.
test_setup.then: Submit button is disabled.
test_setup.when: User inspects the submit button.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form accepts special characters in title and description fields.
test_cases.name: Form Accepts Special Characters In Fields

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered.
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with special characters in title and description.
test_setup.when: User enters special characters in title and description, fills other required fields, and submits.

test_cases.description: Verify that the form fields are cleared after a successful submission.
test_cases.name: Form Resets After Successful Submission

test_setup.given: TaskForm rendered with all fields filled and a mock onSubmit handler.
test_setup.then: All input fields are reset to their default empty state.
test_setup.when: User submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that clicking the Edit button for a task invokes the onEdit callback with the correct task object.
test_cases.name: Edit Button Triggers onEdit Callback

test_setup.given: TaskItem component rendered with a valid task prop and a mock onEdit function.
test_setup.then: The onEdit callback is called with the task object as argument.
test_setup.when: User clicks the Edit button on the task item.

test_cases.description: Verify that clicking the Edit button opens the TaskForm populated with the correct task details for editing.
test_cases.name: Edit Button Opens TaskForm

test_setup.given: TaskItem component rendered with a valid task and TaskForm component is integrated in the editing flow.
test_setup.then: TaskForm is rendered and pre-populated with the task's title, description, priority, due date, and user_name.
test_setup.when: User clicks the Edit button.

test_cases.description: Verify that editing any or all task fields and submitting saves the changes and updates the task in subsequent views.
test_cases.name: All Task Fields Can Be Updated and Saved

test_setup.given: TaskForm is open for an existing task with fields title, description, priority, due date, user_name.
test_setup.then: The updated task is saved, changes are reflected in the task list and subsequent queries.
test_setup.when: User updates any/all fields and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that when only some fields are provided in the update, only those fields are changed and others remain unchanged.
test_cases.name: Partial Task Fields Update

test_setup.given: TaskForm is open with existing task details.
test_setup.then: Only the title is updated; description, priority, due date, and user_name remain unchanged.
test_setup.when: User edits only the title and submits the form.

test_cases.description: Verify that submitting the edit form with no fields changed results in no update and a clear message is shown.
test_cases.name: No Fields Provided in Edit

test_setup.given: TaskForm is open with existing task details.
test_setup.then: No changes occur; a clear message is displayed indicating that no update was performed.
test_setup.when: User submits the form without changing any fields.

test_cases.description: Verify that attempting to edit a task that does not exist returns an explicit error and does not open the TaskForm.
test_cases.name: Edit Non-Existent Task Shows Error

test_setup.given: TaskItem component rendered with a task ID that is not present in the data store.
test_setup.then: An explicit error message is shown and TaskForm is not opened.
test_setup.when: User clicks Edit button.

test_cases.description: Verify that editing one task does not affect the details or state of unrelated tasks in the task list.
test_cases.name: Editing Task Does Not Affect Unrelated Tasks

test_setup.given: Task list contains multiple tasks; TaskForm is opened for one specific task.
test_setup.then: Only the edited task is updated; other tasks remain unchanged.
test_setup.when: User edits and saves changes to one task.

test_cases.description: Verify that the Edit button is rendered for every task item in the task list UI.
test_cases.name: Edit Button Renders for Each Task

test_setup.given: Task list contains several tasks and TaskItem component is used for each.
test_setup.then: Each task item displays an Edit button.
test_setup.when: Task list is rendered.

test_cases.description: Verify that the Edit button is disabled or hidden for tasks marked as read-only.
test_cases.name: Edit Button Disabled for Read-Only Tasks

test_setup.given: TaskItem component rendered with a read-only task prop.
test_setup.then: Edit button is disabled or not rendered for read-only tasks.
test_setup.when: Task list is rendered.

test_cases.description: Verify that the Edit button is accessible via keyboard navigation and has appropriate ARIA attributes.
test_cases.name: Edit Button Accessibility

test_setup.given: TaskItem component rendered in the task list.
test_setup.then: Edit button is focusable and has appropriate ARIA label for accessibility.
test_setup.when: User navigates using keyboard (Tab) and focuses on the Edit button.

test_cases.description: Ensure that when all fields are edited in edit mode and the form is submitted, onSubmit is called with the updated task data.
test_cases.name: Edit task with all fields changed and submit

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask containing all fields (Title, Description, Priority, Due date, User_name)
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with updated task details containing the new values for all fields
test_setup.when: User updates all fields and submits the form

test_cases.description: Ensure that when only some fields are changed, only those fields are updated in the payload, and other fields remain unchanged.
test_cases.name: Edit only some fields and submit

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with updated task details: Title and Priority changed, other fields unchanged
test_setup.when: User changes only the Title and Priority fields and submits the form

test_cases.description: Ensure that submitting the form without changing any fields triggers no update and displays a message indicating no update was performed.
test_cases.name: Submit form without changing any fields

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with the same task data, and the system displays a clear message indicating no update was performed
test_setup.when: User submits the form without modifying any fields

test_cases.description: Ensure that if some fields are missing from the submitted payload, only provided fields are updated and the rest remain unchanged.
test_cases.name: Submit with some fields missing in payload

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with updated Title, Description as empty string, and other fields unchanged
test_setup.when: User clears the Description field (making it empty), modifies Title, and submits the form

test_cases.description: Ensure that if the initialTask is undefined or has an invalid ID, the component displays a clear error message and does not allow editing.
test_cases.name: Attempt to edit a non-existent task

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask as undefined or with an invalid task id
test_setup.then: Component displays an explicit error message indicating the task does not exist; form is not shown
test_setup.when: Component renders

test_cases.description: Ensure that when editing, all form fields are pre-filled with the selected task's details.
test_cases.name: Form pre-fills with initialTask data in edit mode

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with a valid initialTask
test_setup.then: Each input field displays the corresponding value from initialTask
test_setup.when: Component renders

test_cases.description: Ensure that changing any field in the edit form updates the component's internal state accordingly.
test_cases.name: State updates on input change

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: Component state updates to reflect the new Description value
test_setup.when: User types a new value into the Description field

test_cases.description: Ensure that if the user cancels editing, no submit occurs and onSubmit is not called.
test_cases.name: Cancel editing does not submit changes

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: Form is reset or closed, and onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User clicks the cancel button (if present)

test_cases.description: Ensure that if a required field (e.g., Title) is cleared, the form shows a validation error and does not submit.
test_cases.name: Form validation for required fields

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: Form displays a validation error for Title and onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User clears the Title field and submits the form

test_cases.description: Ensure that editing and submitting changes to one task does not update or modify other tasks in the system.
test_cases.name: Editing a task does not affect other tasks

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask for Task A; other tasks exist
test_setup.then: Only Task A is updated; other tasks remain unchanged
test_setup.when: User edits and submits Task A

test_cases.description: Ensure that the Priority input in edit mode displays all available options and the current value is selected.
test_cases.name: Priority field displays correct options

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask with a specific priority value
test_setup.then: Priority dropdown displays all options and selects the value matching initialTask.priority
test_setup.when: Component renders

test_cases.description: Ensure that the Due date input is pre-filled with the correct date value from initialTask, formatted appropriately.
test_cases.name: Due date field displays correctly formatted date

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask with a specific due date
test_setup.then: Due date input displays the date from initialTask in the correct format (e.g., yyyy-mm-dd)
test_setup.when: Component renders

test_cases.description: Ensure that the User_name input field is pre-filled with the value from initialTask.
test_cases.name: User_name field is pre-filled with initialTask value

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask containing User_name
test_setup.then: User_name input field displays the value from initialTask.User_name
test_setup.when: Component renders

test_cases.description: Ensure that submitting the form with an invalid due date format displays a validation error and does not call onSubmit.
test_cases.name: Submitting with invalid due date shows error

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask
test_setup.then: Form displays a due date validation error and onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User enters an invalid date string in the Due date input and submits the form

test_cases.description: Ensure that while the form is submitting (e.g., during an async operation), additional submits are prevented.
test_cases.name: Prevent multiple submits while loading

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with initialTask and is in submitting/loading state
test_setup.then: Only one submit event is processed; subsequent submits are ignored until the first completes
test_setup.when: User attempts to submit the form multiple times rapidly

test_cases.description: User creates a task with all required fields correctly populated. Task is created and all details are returned.
test_cases.name: create_task_successful

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task without a title. The system should reject the request.

test_setup.given: A valid user and an empty tasks list.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error indicating missing title.
test_setup.when: User omits the title field in the payload.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task without a description. The system should reject the request.
test_cases.name: create_task_missing_description

test_setup.given: A valid user.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error indicating missing description.
test_setup.when: User omits the description field in the payload.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task without a priority. The system should reject the request.
test_cases.name: create_task_missing_priority

test_setup.given: A valid user.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error indicating missing priority.
test_setup.when: User omits the priority field in the payload.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task without a due date. The system should reject the request.

test_setup.given: A valid user.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error indicating missing due_date.
test_setup.when: User omits the due_date field in the payload.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task without a user_name. The system should reject the request.
test_cases.name: create_task_missing_user_name

test_setup.given: A valid user.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error indicating missing user_name.
test_setup.when: User omits the user_name field in the payload.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task with an empty string for title. Should fail validation.
test_cases.name: create_task_empty_title

test_setup.given: A valid user.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error for empty title.
test_setup.when: User provides an empty string for title.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task with an invalid due_date format. Should fail validation.

test_cases.description: Create a task with a title exactly at the maximum allowed length (255 characters). Should succeed.
test_cases.name: create_task_title_max_length

test_setup.given: A user is registered.
test_setup.then: The task is created successfully with the long title.
test_setup.when: User submits a title of exactly 255 characters.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task with a title exceeding maximum length (256 characters). Should fail validation.
test_cases.name: create_task_title_exceeds_max_length

test_setup.given: A user is registered.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error for title length.
test_setup.when: User submits a title longer than the allowed maximum.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create two tasks with the same title for the same user. Should allow if no uniqueness constraint.
test_cases.name: create_task_duplicate_title_same_user

test_setup.given: A user exists.
test_setup.then: Both tasks are created if no uniqueness constraint on title per user.
test_setup.when: User submits two tasks with the same title.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a task with extra unexpected fields. System should ignore extras and create the task.
test_cases.name: create_task_extra_fields_ignored

test_setup.given: A user exists.
test_setup.then: Task is created and extra fields are ignored.
test_setup.when: User includes extra fields in the payload.

test_cases.description: User sends an empty JSON object as payload. Should fail validation.
test_cases.name: create_task_blank_payload

test_setup.given: A user exists.
test_setup.then: The API returns a validation error listing all missing fields.
test_setup.when: User sends an empty payload.

test_cases.description: Successfully update all fields of an existing task.
test_cases.name: Update Task With All Fields

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists in the database with original fields.
test_setup.then: The task is updated and the new values are returned in the response.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent to /tasks/12345 with all fields updated.

test_cases.description: Successfully update only some fields of an existing task, leaving others unchanged.
test_cases.name: Update Task With Partial Fields

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists with original fields.
test_setup.then: Only provided fields are updated, others remain unchanged.
test_setup.when: A PUT request updates only priority and due_date.

test_cases.description: Send an update request with an empty body; expect a clear message and no changes.
test_cases.name: Update Task With No Fields Provided

response_body_json.message: No fields provided for update. No changes performed.

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists.
test_setup.then: No changes occur and a clear message is returned.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent with an empty JSON body.

test_cases.description: Attempt to update a task that does not exist; expect a 404 error.
test_cases.name: Update Non-existent Task

test_setup.given: Task with ID 99999 does not exist in the database.
test_setup.then: API returns 404 and error message.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent for task 99999.

test_cases.description: Update an existing task with an invalid priority value; expect a validation error.
test_cases.name: Update Task With Invalid Priority Value

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists.
test_setup.then: API returns 400 status and validation error.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent with priority set to an invalid value.

test_cases.description: Attempt to update due_date with an invalid date format; expect a validation error.
test_cases.name: Update Task With Invalid Due Date Format

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists.
test_setup.then: API returns 400 and error message.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent with due_date in invalid format.

test_cases.description: Ensure updating one task does not alter any other tasks.
test_cases.name: Editing Task Does Not Affect Unrelated Tasks

test_setup.given: Tasks with IDs 12345 and 54321 exist in the database.
test_setup.then: Task 54321 remains completely unchanged.
test_setup.when: A PUT request updates only task 12345.

test_cases.description: Update task fields with empty strings; should update fields to empty values.
test_cases.name: Update Task With Empty String Fields

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists with non-empty title and description.
test_setup.then: Fields are updated to empty values.
test_setup.when: A PUT request sets title and description to empty strings.

test_cases.description: Update task's title with a string at the maximum allowed length.
test_cases.name: Update Task With Maximum Length Title

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 and max title length of 255 characters.
test_setup.then: Title is updated and no errors are returned.
test_setup.when: A PUT request updates title to maximum length.

test_cases.description: Attempt to update a task without Content-Type header; expect a 415 error.
test_cases.name: Update Task Without Content-Type Header

test_setup.given: Task with ID 12345 exists.
test_setup.then: API returns 415 error.
test_setup.when: A PUT request is sent without Content-Type header.
